revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月廿五]][[zh:二月廿五]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 25|qq=February 25}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 25''' is the 25th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|681|en|681|qid=Q30342|lt=681|1=681}} {{ill|March 19|en|March 19|qid=Q2424|lt=March 19|1=March 19}}) – {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} ordered the establishment of the 【律令】 system. * {{ill|Chōhō (era)|en|Chōhō (era)|qid=Q1324844|lt=Chōhō|1=Chōhō (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1000|en|1000|qid=Q1218946|lt=1000|1=1000}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|qid=Q2511|lt=April 2|1=April 2}}) – The Empress consort (中宮) {{ill|Teishi|ja|定子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原定子|1=Fujiwara no Teishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1190972}} of the Fujiwara clan and the Empress (女御) {{ill|Akiko|ja|彰子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiko|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原彰子|1=Empress Shōshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q901949}} were appointed as the consort and chūgū, respectively, of {{ill|Emperor Ichijō|en|Emperor Ichijō|qid=Q449540|lt=Emperor Ichijō|1=Emperor Ichijō}}. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1670|en|1670|qid=Q7606|lt=1670|1=1670}} {{ill|April 14|en|April 14|qid=Q2500|lt=April 14|1=April 14}}) – The {{ill|Hakone Yōsui|ja|箱根用水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakone Yōsui|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 深良用水|1=Fukara Aqueduct|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11560257}} was completed. * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|qid=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – The warship {{ill|Kanrin Maru|en|Kanrin Maru|qid=Q2698119|lt=Kamlinmaru|1=Kanrin Maru}} arrived in San Francisco. == Births == * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 22nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1415|en|1415|qid=Q6183|lt=1415|1=1415}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|qid=Q2508|lt=April 4|1=April 4}}) – {{ill|Rennyo|en|Rennyo|qid=Q323600|lt=Rennyo|1=Rennyo}}, the restorer of Jōdo Shinshū (died {{ill|1499|en|1499|qid=Q6708|lt=1499|1=1499}}). * {{ill|An'ei|en|An'ei|qid=Q1193910|lt=An'ei|1=An'ei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1773|en|1773|qid=Q7692|lt=1773|1=1773}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – {{ill|Tomotoyoshi|ja|伴信友|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomotoyoshi|1=Ban Nobutomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4346747}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1846|en|1846|qid=Q7640|lt=1846|1=1846}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1832|en|1832|qid=Q7584|lt=1832|1=1832}} {{ill|March 27|en|March 27|qid=Q2457|lt=March 27|1=March 27}}) – {{ill|Yanagawa Haruzan|ja|柳河春三|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagawa Haruzan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 柳川春三|1=Shunsan Yanagawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17222076}}, a Western studies scholar and founder of the newspaper 【Chūgai Shimbun】 (died {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}}). * Tenpō 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1833|en|1833|qid=Q7587|lt=1833|1=1833}} {{ill|April 14|en|April 14|qid=Q2500|lt=April 14|1=April 14}}) – {{ill|Ōtori Keisuke|en|Ōtori Keisuke|qid=Q1049123|lt=Ōtori Keisuke|1=Ōtori Keisuke}}, a military scholar and retainer (died {{ill|1911|en|1911|qid=Q2076|lt=1911|1=1911}}). * Tenpō 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – {{ill|Matsukata Masayoshi|en|Matsukata Masayoshi|qid=Q714039|lt=Matsukata Masayoshi|1=Matsukata Masayoshi}}, who later served as Prime Minister (4th/6th) and founded the Bank of Japan (died {{ill|1924|en|1924|qid=Q2173|lt=1924|1=1924}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 5th year (leap February) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|qid=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} {{ill|April 14|en|April 14|qid=Q2500|lt=April 14|1=April 14}}) – {{ill|Kodama Gentarō|en|Kodama Gentarō|qid=Q72515|lt=Kodama Gentarō|1=Kodama Gentarō}}, an Army officer (died {{ill|1906|en|1906|qid=Q2049|lt=1906|1=1906}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|April 10|en|April 10|qid=Q2502|lt=April 10|1=April 10}}) – {{ill|Terasaki Kogyo|en|Terasaki Kogyo|qid=Q11457861|lt=Terazaki Hiroyoshi|1=Terasaki Kogyo}}, a Japanese painter (died {{ill|1919|en|1919|qid=Q2157|lt=1919|1=1919}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|qid=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|903|en|903|qid=Q23630|lt=903|1=903}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|qid=Q2456|lt=March 26|1=March 26}}) – {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|qid=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane}}, a courtier and Confucian scholar (born {{ill|845|en|845|qid=Q25103|lt=845|1=845}}). <Note: The entry for “契沖” records "January 25" in another source.> == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|24|2|26|1|25|3|2|0225|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 25일]] [[ja:2月25日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月廿五]]
[[ar:February 25 (Lunisolar)]]
